statement.p: Determine which of the following functions are one-to-one.

solution.p: f(x) = \sqrt[3]{x} is one-to-one. Power functions of the form x^p or x^{\drac{1}{p}} will be one-to-one when p is odd.
g(x) = \sin(x) is not one-to-one on the domain [0,\pi]\text{.} For example, g(0) \sin(0) = 0 = \sin(\pi) = g(\pi)\text{.}
h(x) = e^{x^2} is not one-to-one. For example, h(1) = h(-1) = e\text{.}
r(x) = |5-x| is not one-to-one. For example, r(4) = r(6) = 1\text{.}
k(x) = \ln(5x)+3 is one-to-one. It is a logarithmic function shifted up 3 units.
